subject: Mathematics
title: The Sierpinski Triangle
description: Learn The Sierpinski Triangle in one minute.

hook.text: Remove the middle triangle from a triangle. Repeat for each remaining triangle. Forever.

buildup.text: After enough steps, you get the Sierpinski triangle—a shape full of holes at every scale.

discovery.text: Its dimension is about 1.585—partway between a one-dimensional line and a two-dimensional surface.

twist.text: Color Pascal's Triangle by odd and even entries—the Sierpinski pattern appears spontaneously.

climax.text: The same pattern emerges from random processes, cellular automata, and tower of Hanoi solutions.

punchline.text: Remove endlessly and a beautiful skeleton survives.

quiz.question: How is the Sierpinski triangle constructed?
options: By repeatedly removing the middle triangle from each sub-triangle
